goal: Implement P0-P3 upload completeness hardening for ownership, test isolation, resumable chunked upload integrity, streaming instant-copy, metrics, and hook consolidation.
assumptions: The active upload UI controller is frontend/src/components/files/upload/useUploadDialogController.ts.
frontend/src/hooks/files/useFileUpload.ts is unused by current application code.
upload_sessions.uploaded_parts is the backend source of truth for chunked resume state.
Retryable transport failures should preserve chunked sessions for resume; cancellation and validation failures should clear local resume state and abort server sessions.
folder_id is user-owned and must be validated before writing or completing files into a folder.
risks: Shared PostgreSQL integration tests can delete each other's users or sessions when run in parallel.
A stale local resume record can attach a browser upload to the wrong backend session.
Accepting short or wrong chunks can create corrupted session state.
Instant upload cross-user copy can read large files into memory if implemented with get_file plus save_file.
Removing the unused hook without moving tests can reduce coverage of the live upload dialog.
dependencies: serial_test for shared database integration test isolation
steps: Add failing ownership and chunk-integrity tests.
Isolate upload handler integration tests with serial_test.
Persist and validate frontend chunked resume records.
Send X-Part-SHA256 for every chunk and validate chunk checksum and byte length in the backend.
Move instant upload cross-user copy into the storage abstraction.
Delete unused useFileUpload and move coverage to useUploadDialogController.
Update permanent constraints, testing strategy, changelog, and quality score.
Run targeted backend and frontend verification.
